## Summary

Short description of the change and why it's needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests (unit/integration) as appropriate.
- [ ] I validated the trainer locally with `python3 -m scripts.train_and_save`.
- [ ] I ran the Evidently canary locally and attached `artifacts/canary/canary_report.json` if submitting a promotion.
- [ ] I ensured CI workflows pass (container_train_and_canary + feast_materialize_integration).
- [ ] If this change publishes artifacts, I verified signing is configured in CI or manual promotion steps.

## Notes for reviewers

Provide any special testing instructions or important caveats.
